description:
Assign outcomes to randomness
• Tap the side of a dice to change almost every facet - colour; text; image (SVG); # of sides
• Clone dice to create new dice (d2...d20)
• Configure roll behaviour of individual dice
• Select which dice to roll
• Settings to show only what you want to see
• Import & export everything
• Small, modern, codebase
• User feedback / contribution drives development
